name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Playing {Distant Melody} temporarily reduces the DMG dealt by all "Humanoid" enemies by [Arg4]%, this effect cannot stack. {Requiem} generates [Arg3] Aliemus, and generates +1 time for each negative state dispelled.
